# waggle_placements (Resource)

Adopts an existing waggle placement (created by a pool) into Terraform state and optionally backfills its Proxmox vmid. Placements are created by waggle_pools, not by this resource.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `placement_id` (String) UUID of the waggle placement to adopt. Typically sourced from waggle_pool_placements.

### Optional

- `vmid` (Number) Proxmox vmid to backfill into the placement. When set, PATCH /placements/{id} is called. Omit to leave the vmid unset.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Placement creation timestamp.
- `hypervisor_id` (String) Hypervisor this placement is assigned to.
- `hypervisor_name` (String) Proxmox node name for this placement.
- `id` (String) Same as placement_id; set on create for Terraform import compatibility.
- `pool_id` (String) Pool that owns this placement.
